error.notStaff: This app is for staff only
error.noStores: No store assignments — contact your manager

yesterday.reminder: Finish yesterday's counts — tap Yesterday above.

list.empty: No items configured for this vendor

banner.lastSubmitted: Last submitted at {time} — your changes will overwrite
banner.alreadySubmitted: Already submitted — your counts match the existing submission

toast.alreadySubmitted: Already submitted — your counts match the existing submission

error.forbidden: Cannot submit for this store — your access has changed. Sign out and back in.

item.alsoFromOne: also available from {vendors} — order from one
item.alsoFromMany: also available from {count} other vendors ({vendors}) — order from one

export.label: Export / share
export.textAria: Export reorder list as plain text

empty.title: NO REORDER SUGGESTIONS
empty.body: No reorder suggestions for this store on this date. Could be no counts done yet, all items at par, or no active vendors.

nothingToday.title: NOTHING TO ORDER
nothingToday.body: No vendors are scheduled to order out on {day}.

error.title: Could not load reorder list
error.generic: Could not load the reorder list — try again

noSchedule.title: No order schedule · {count}
noSchedule.hint: These vendors have no order-out day set, so they're not in today's list.

countNotSubmitted.title: Count not submitted yet
countNotSubmitted.body: No end-of-day count was submitted for this date, so order quantities are hidden. Submit the count to see suggestions.

warning.scheduleUnknown: Vendor "{vendor}" has no order schedule — using 7-day buffer.

weekly.title: Weekly count
weekly.subtitle: Full-store count — every item, advisory snapshot

list.empty: No items configured for this store

lowStock.detail: {onHand} {unit} on hand — runs out before next delivery {date}
lowStock.detailNoUnit: {onHand} on hand — runs out before next delivery {date}

banner.due: Weekly count is due — please complete a full-store count.
banner.overdue: Weekly count is overdue — please complete it today.
banner.completed: Weekly count completed for the week of {date}

toast.alreadySubmitted: Already submitted — this weekly count was previously recorded

error.forbidden: Cannot submit for this store — your access has changed. Sign out and back in.

draft.savedLocal: Saved on this device — will sync when online
draft.discardConfirmBody: This clears the saved values for this count. This cannot be undone.
draft.saveFailed: Could not save draft — try again
draft.discardFailed: Could not discard draft — try again

receiving.title: Receiving
receiving.subtitle: Receive deliveries against open purchase orders

list.empty: No open purchase orders to receive for this store. New deliveries show up here once an order is sent.

commit.label: Commit receive
commit.confirmMessage: Receive {count} line(s), {total} units total. This updates stock.

offline.message: You're offline — connect to receive a delivery.

nothingToReceive.message: Nothing to receive — enter at least one quantity.

receiving.noLineItemsBody: This purchase order has no items to receive.

queue.syncErrorBanner: Could not sync — your access to {date} / {vendor} changed.

signOut.label: Sign out
signOut.confirmMessage: Queued counts will sync next time you sign in.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: Your counts are saved. Please restart the app.

refreshApp.label: Refresh
refreshApp.aria: Reload the app to get the latest version

reportIssue.title: Report an issue
reportIssue.error: Couldn't send your report. Please try again.

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.reminderBanner: Turn on notifications to get reminders

iosInstall.title: Add this app to your Home Screen to enable notifications
iosInstall.steps: Tap Share, then 'Add to Home Screen'.

msg.unsupported: Notifications aren't available in this browser.
msg.misconfigured: Notifications are misconfigured on the server.
msg.denied: Notifications are blocked. Re-enable them in your device/browser settings, then try again.
msg.dismissed: Permission was dismissed. Tap to try again.
